input.title: JavaScriptコードを記述すると静的解析ツールでエラーが発生します。対処方法を教えてください。

content.text: Added `HtmlChecker`, `HtmlSyntaxChecker`, `TokenMgrError`, and `ParserTokenManager` to the s1 hints array. These class names appear in the exception stack trace that users would encounter when the error occurs.

result: Added `HtmlChecker`, `HtmlSyntaxChecker`, `TokenMgrError`, and `ParserTokenManager` to the s1 hints array. These class names appear in the exception stack trace that users would encounter when the error occurs.
